allow: Bash(node -e "import\('better-sqlite3'\).then\(\({default:D}\)=>{const db=new D\(':memory:'\);db.exec\('create table t\(id integer primary key, v text\)'\);db.prepare\('insert into t\(v\) values\(?\)'\).run\('ok'\);const r=db.prepare\('select v from t where id=1'\).get\(\);console.log\('better-sqlite3 OK ->', r.v, '| sqlite', db.prepare\('select sqlite_version\(\) as v'\).get\(\).v\);db.close\(\);}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('FAILED',e\);process.exit\(1\);}\);")
